usage: create_spice_deck [-help] [-add_driver_for_constraint_check {true false}] [-add_side_load_measurement {true false}] [-add_voltage_for_missing_sensitization] [-aging_correlation_type {full timingonly}] [-aging_stress_num_cycles <integer>] [-aging_stress_use_timing_slew {true false}] [-aginglevel_only <string>] [-bbox_cells <string>] [-constraint_check {true false}] [-depth <integer>] [-enable_arrival_measurements {true false}] [-enable_fast_simulation {true false}] [-enable_mis {tied_input independent_input none}] [-enable_spectre_x {true false}] [-exclude_side_load_cells <string>] [-exclude_side_load_cells_for_missing_subckt {true false}] [-file_prefix <string>] [-force_delete_output_dir] [-format <string>] [-from <string>] [-from_fall <string>] [-from_rise <string>] [-generate_output_only {true false}] [-glitch_simulation_mode {input_output output}] [-ground <string>] [-include_cell_variation {true false}] [-lsf_job_string <string>] [-mc_simulation_init_args <string>] [-mc_simulation_tran_args <string>] [-measure_point {all path stage none}] [-merge_spice_deck {true false}] [-model_file <string>] [-no_hard_stop_at_to_pins {true false}] [-omipath <string>] [-outdir <string>] [-power <string>] [-receiver_pin <string>] [-reliability_commands <string>] [-reliability_model_type {URI OMI TMI TI_URI}] [-report_noise <string>] [-report_timing <string>] [-run_simulation] [-segment {data_path launch_path launch_clock_path capture_path all}] [-segment_end <string>] [-segment_start <string>] [-side_path_level <integer>] [-spectre <string>] [-spectre_analysis_options <string>] [-spectre_cmd_options <string>] [-spectre_lang_escape_chars <string>] [-spice_include <string>] [-spice_include_reliability <string>] [-start_from_cppr_pin {true false}] [-stimuli_file <string>] [-subckt_file <string>] [-supply_voltage_file <string>] [-supply_voltage_file_stress <string>] [-sweep_range <float>] [-sweep_steps <integer>] [-sweep_victim {true false}] [-temperature <float>] [-through <string>] [-to <string>] [-uri_lib_file <string>] [-uri_mode <string>] [-use_control_param {true false}] [-use_distributed_load_for_side_receivers {true false}] [-use_ndw_for_constraint_check {true false}] [-use_noise_model_when_cond {true false}] [-use_predriver_waveform_at_startpoint {true false}] [-user_defined_measure_statements {append overwrite}] [-user_defined_measure_statements_file <string>] [-view <string>] [-waveform_aware_pulse_width_checks {true false}] [-xtalk {delay vl_glitch vh_glitch vlu_glitch vho_glitch}] [ [ > | >> ] ]

options.name: -help
options.description: 打印命令用法

options.name: -add_driver_for_constraint_check
options.description: {true false} 在时钟和数据上添加真实驱动器

options.name: -add_side_load_measurement
options.description: 在时钟网格 SPICE 网表中添加侧载测量

options.name: -add_voltage_for_missing_sensitization
options.description: 为缺失的敏感化添加电压

options.name: -aging_correlation_type
options.description: {full timingonly} 创建老化感知网表

options.name: -aging_stress_num_cycles
options.description: 在老应力网表中使用那么多周期的激励

options.name: -aging_stress_use_timing_slew
options.description: {true false} 校正用于老应力网表的转换时间

options.name: -aginglevel_only
options.description: 用于 URI 模型

options.name: -bbox_cells
options.description: 视为黑盒的单元列表

options.name: -constraint_check
options.description: 启用约束验证流程

options.name: -depth
options.description: 创建指定深度的时钟网格 SPICE 网表

options.name: -enable_arrival_measurements
options.description: {true false} 添加到达时间测量

options.name: -enable_fast_simulation
options.description: 使用初始条件进行一次转换仿真

options.name: -enable_mis
options.description: {tied_input independent_input none}

options.name: -enable_spectre_x
options.description: 启动 spectre 时启用 spectreX 许可证检查

options.name: -exclude_side_load_cells
options.description: 将使用引脚电容而非实例化作为侧载的单元列表

options.name: -exclude_side_load_cells_for_missing_subckt
options.description: {true false} 为真时，将为缺失 SPICE 子电路的单元添加侧载引脚电容，而非实例化该单元

options.name: -file_prefix
options.description: 为生成的 SPICE 网表文件添加此前缀

options.name: -force_delete_output_dir
options.description: 完全删除用户在 outdir 选项中指定的目录

options.name: -format
options.description: 更改运行路径仿真内部报告格式。格式列应与 report_timing_format 兼容。设置后，后续的 create_spice_deck 命令将使用相同格式

options.name: -from
options.description: 创建从指定引脚开始的网格网表 SPICE 网表

options.name: -from_fall
options.description: 创建从指定 from 引脚的下降沿开始的网格网表 SPICE 网表

options.name: -from_rise
options.description: 创建从指定 from 引脚的上升沿开始的网格网表 SPICE 网表

options.name: -generate_output_only
options.description: 从现有已创建的数据库文件生成输出

options.name: -glitch_simulation_mode
options.description: {input_output output} input_output：默认（rip+rop 仿真）output：SPICE ROP 将使用 Tempus RIP 计算

options.name: -ground
options.description: 地节点列表

options.name: -include_cell_variation
options.description: 包含通孔变化

options.name: -lsf_job_string
options.description: 用于启动仿真的作业提交句柄

options.name: -mc_simulation_init_args
options.description: 蒙特卡洛仿真设置，默认值：numruns=1000 variations=mismatch sampling=lhs paramfile=Param.txt scalarfile=MCData.txt dut=[%s]

options.name: -mc_simulation_tran_args
options.description: 蒙特卡洛仿真设置，默认值：start=0 stop=%g step=1p errpreset=conservative

options.name: -measure_point
options.description: 是否添加所有、路径或级测量。默认为 all

options.name: -merge_spice_deck
options.description: 启用合并 SPICE 网表的选项

options.name: -model_file
options.description: 模型文件，将包含在生成的 SPICE 中

options.name: -no_hard_stop_at_to_pins
options.description: 为真时，将一直向下遍历，直到遇到触发器的时钟引脚或 -to{} 选项指定的任何停止点，或达到 -depth 选项指定的深度

options.name: -omipath
options.description: OMI 模型目录

options.name: -outdir
options.description: 创建的 SPICE 的输出目录

options.name: -power
options.description: 电源节点列表

options.name: -receiver_pin
options.description: 用于毛刺 SPICE 网表的接收器引脚列表

options.name: -reliability_commands
options.description: 可靠性部分的额外用户命令（在瞬态分析语句之前可靠性部分中的命令）

options.name: -reliability_model_type
options.description: {URI OMI TMI TI_URI} 创建老化感知网表

options.name: -report_noise
options.description: 用于创建毛刺 SPICE 网表的 report_noise 命令的参数

options.name: -report_timing
options.description: 用于 report_timing 命令的参数

options.name: -run_simulation
options.description: 除生成 SPICE 网表外，还启用路径仿真

options.name: -segment
options.description: {data_path launch_path launch_clock_path capture_path all} 从路径 SPICE 网表中创建该分段的 SPICE 网表

options.name: -segment_end
options.description: 指定分段终止端名称

options.name: -segment_start
options.description: 指定分段起始端名称

options.name: -side_path_level
options.description: 指定 SPICE 跟踪中包含的侧路径级数。只能为 0 或 1。默认值为 1

options.name: -spectre
options.description: spectre 路径位置

options.name: -spectre_analysis_options
options.description: spectre 选项

options.name: -spectre_cmd_options
options.description: spectre 的命令行选项

options.name: -spectre_lang_escape_chars
options.description: spectre 中的转义字符列表

options.name: -spice_include
options.description: 按原样包含在生成的 SPICE 网表中

options.name: -spice_include_reliability
options.description: 指定用户提供的可靠性部分中的字符串

options.name: -start_from_cppr_pin
options.description: 从 CPPR 点开始进行 SPICE 仿真

options.name: -stimuli_file
options.description: 允许指定给那些 SPICE 网表难以敏感化的单元的激励

options.name: -subckt_file
options.description: 子电路文件，将包含在生成的 SPICE 中

options.name: -supply_voltage_file
options.description: 用户定义的电源/地电压文件

options.name: -supply_voltage_file_stress
options.description: 用户定义的电源/地电压文件

options.name: -sweep_range
options.description: 受害信号的扫描范围

options.name: -sweep_steps
options.description: 受害信号扫描的步数

options.name: -sweep_victim
options.description: 启用受害信号扫描

options.name: -temperature
options.description: 用户定义的温度，用于 SPICE 仿真。单位：摄氏度

options.name: -through
options.description: 创建经过 -through 点的网格网表 SPICE 网表

options.name: -to
options.description: 创建终止于 to 引脚的网格网表 SPICE 网表

options.name: -uri_lib_file
options.description: 用于 URI 模型（例如 Samsung）

options.name: -uri_mode
options.description: 指定 URI 附加选项；默认值=appendage

options.name: -use_control_param
options.description: 创建的 SPICE 网表将通过参数控制

options.name: -use_distributed_load_for_side_receivers
options.description: {true false} 是否将接收器负载用作分布式负载或集中式负载

options.name: -use_ndw_for_constraint_check
options.description: {true false} 在约束检查中使用 ndw

options.name: -use_noise_model_when_cond
options.description: 使用来自引脚噪声模型的 when 条件

options.name: -use_predriver_waveform_at_startpoint
options.description: {true false} 指定在起始点使用预驱动器波形还是传播波形

options.name: -user_defined_measure_statements
options.description: {append overwrite} 用户定义的测量语句；默认值为 append

options.name: -user_defined_measure_statements_file
options.description: <string> 用户定义的测量

options.name: -view
options.description: 视图名称，如果为默认视图以外的视图创建毛刺 SPICE 网表

options.name: -waveform_aware_pulse_width_checks
options.description: {true false} 用于波形感知脉冲宽度检查的网表

options.name: -xtalk
options.description: 将 -run_path_simulation/-run_simulation 的输出重定向到文件（重定向操作符，可选）>> <文件名> # 追加 -run_path_simulation/-run_simulation 到输出文件
